## 📝 Description
Provide a concise summary of the changes and reasoning.

## 🎯 Related Issues
Closes # (issue number)

## 🛠️ Type of Change
- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] refactor: Code optimization without behavior change
- [ ] chore: Infrastructure, dependencies, or tools update
- [ ] test: Adding or modifying tests

## 🧪 Testing & Code Quality Verification
- **Unit Tests**: Pass / Fail
- **Radon CC (Python only)**: Complexity score: [A/B/C]
- **Bruno API Integration Tests**: Pass / Fail

## 🔍 Self-Review Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style rules (Checkstyle, Ruff, Prettier).
- [ ] Database migrations included (Flyway) if DB schema modified.
- [ ] Verified local Docker environment.
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets.
